articles.title: Momentum stocks just saw one of the biggest reversals in five years. What usually happens next.
articles.excerpt: There had been ample warnings that stocks with price momentum had shot up too quickly, and on Thursday gravity reasserted itself.

articles.title: Why the Iran War is Hitting Indian Stocks Harder Than Other Markets
articles.excerpt: Record foreign outflows and surging energy costs are battering India's economy and the rupee. While geopolitical tensions drive crude prices higher, some sectors show resilience amid the volatility.

articles.title: Trump threatens EU with ‘much higher' tariffs if no trade deal signed by new deadline
articles.excerpt: Trump said he will give the European Union until July 4 to ratify its trade agreement with the U.S. The president warned tariffs "would immediately jump to much higher levels" if the bloc failed to do so.

articles.title: Earnings Resilience Amid Iran Risk: Markets Snapshot
articles.excerpt: The shape-shifting artificial intelligence trade and the ongoing conflict in the Middle East dominated conversations in a week that saw strong earnings results. The Opening Trade spoke with leading market voices and company executives to get their take.

articles.title: U.S. Bank Stocks Follow The Broader Market Higher In April
articles.excerpt: The 205 banks in an S&P Global Market Intelligence analysis had a median total return of 6.2% in April. Thirty-nine of the banks recorded a double-digit percentage gain last month, led by Bedminster, New Jersey-based Peapack-Gladstone Financial Corp. at 18.6%.

articles.title: The Trump Administration's Picks Are Beating the Market. One Name Accounts for Most of the Gain.
articles.excerpt: The government has taken equity stakes in eight public companies since January 2025. Five have outperformed the S&P 500 since the deals were announced.

articles.title: Tech stocks could offer their best value in years after another stellar earnings season, analysts say
articles.excerpt: Whether tech stocks can continue generating stellar earnings into the future is a hot topic among analysts at present. Morningstar found that the AI theme is trading at its largest discount since 2019.

articles.title: U.K. Shop Visits Dip as Inflation Bites into Spending
articles.excerpt: Visits to retail shops dropped 10.7% on year in the in April, the weakest performance in more than five years, according to a report from the British Retail Consortium.

articles.title: IMF Warns That Evolving AI Threat Could Upend Financial Markets
articles.excerpt: Advances in artificial-intelligence can strengthen markets' defense against cyber threats but the technology now has the capacity to cause a macro-financial shock too, the IMF warns.

articles.title: Asian stock markets dip as geopolitical risks weigh on investors

articles.title: Insurance Brokers Q1 2026 Update
articles.excerpt: Insurance brokers are currently in a world of pain as the halcyon days of the hard market are clearly behind us. Every broker reported sharper property declines.

articles.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
articles.excerpt: Iran war may dominate the first U.S. presidential visit to China since 2017. U.S. business delegation may be smaller than those other countries have brought to China recently, according to a source familiar with the matter.
